title: Paper-51: Mass and Yukawa 3 — BSM Constraints and Flavor-Symmetry Breaking

D_claims.claim: verify_bsm_yukawa_bounds: Check BSM Yukawa corrections against LHC and flavor bounds.
verify_vectorlike_fermion_constraints: Validate vector-like fermion mass scale limits.
verify_seesaw_flavor_consistency: Ensure type-I seesaw satisfies LFV constraints.
